CustomField.description: PR Supplier - This Supplier is linked to the Item Master [Prefered Supplier (1st)] or Quote Supplier unless otherwise updated.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This Supplier is linked to the Item Master [Prefered Supplier (1st)] or Quote Supplier unless otherwise updated.
CustomField.label: Supplier

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Only Supplier accounts are allowed. Please check the Supplier selected.
